---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change to how BlastRadius works (not a new language adapter — use that template)
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you'd like to be able to do

<!-- The use case, concretely. "When I do X, I want Y, because Z." -->

## What you'd suggest building

<!--
A rough sketch. Hand-wavy is fine — scope gets worked out before code.
-->

## Why this fits BlastRadius's scope

<!--
BlastRadius is intentionally small, with load-bearing constraints:
no LLM in the analysis, no server/daemon, no network at analysis time,
no false edges, deterministic committed output.

If your idea keeps all of those, great. If it needs to relax one, say so
explicitly — the bar for relaxing them is high, because they're what make
the tool trustworthy and adoptable.
-->
